action_set_definitions.name: get_alert_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level metadata for a specific AML alert, including the reason it was triggered.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

action_set_definitions.name: get_customer_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves KYC data for the entity associated with the alert, including business address and reported scale of operations.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

action_set_definitions.name: get_internal_risk_indicators
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the hidden internal suspicion score and risk metrics used to determine investigative constraints.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

action_set_definitions.name: get_transaction_ledger
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the full transaction history for the account under review, including amounts, MCC codes, and descriptions.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

action_set_definitions.name: send_customer_rfi
action_set_definitions.description: Issues a Request for Information (RFI) to the customer. WARNING: Restricted by suspicion score thresholds.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

rfi_content.description: The detailed inquiry regarding business activities or transactions.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_investigation_report
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the review by submitting the SAR decision and the investigative narrative.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

narrative.description: The detailed investigative summary, adhering to all filtering and exclusion rules.

state_description.alert_metadata: Basic information about the triggered alert, including ID and trigger reason.
state_description.customer_profile: Internal KYC (Know Your Customer) data and risk categorization.
state_description.transaction_ledger: A comprehensive list of all transactions associated with the account under review.
state_description.investigation_log: Chronological log of notes and internal flags added during the review process.
state_description.internal_risk_indicators: Hidden scores used by the world model to determine future observations (not visible to agent).
